allow: Bash(netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name=all dir=in)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName ''DJI*'' | ForEach-Object { $rule = $_; $port = Get-NetFirewallPortFilter -AssociatedNetFirewallRule $rule; [PSCustomObject]@{Name=$rule.DisplayName; Enabled=$rule.Enabled; Direction=$rule.Direction; Action=$rule.Action; Protocol=$port.Protocol; LocalPort=$port.LocalPort; Profile=$rule.Profile} } | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name="DJI RC Discovery" verbose)
Bash(netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name="DJI RC Beacon" verbose)
Bash(python -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile\(''discovery.py'', doraise=True\); py_compile.compile\(''main.py'', doraise=True\); print\(''OK''\)")
Bash(adb shell ip addr show wlan0)
